zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Worsley於1302年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，他的父親William de la Lee27歲，母親Isabelle Courtenay24歲。他於1324年與Lady Isolde Lea在英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯坦迪什結婚。他去世於1349年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃斯利享年47歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Worsley in Lancashire or Worsley Farm in Rock (Worcestershire). The Lancashire placename may derive from an Old English personal name Weorcgȳth (genitive Weorcgȳthes) + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename may take its name from a lost stream-name Worf + Old English lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Worsley was born in 1302, in Standish, Lancashire, England, his father, William de la Lee, was 27 and his mother, Isabelle Courtenay, was 24. He married Lady Isolde Lea in 1324, in Standish, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1349, in Worsley, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Worsley(이)가 1302년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de la Lee(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle Courtenay(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 Lady Isolde Lea(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1349년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워슬리에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.
